title: Convert trust-the-UI auth to per-event ownership with on_mount + stream
prompt: The fixture test_fixtures/missing_authz_handle_event.ex relies on hiding the delete button to block unauthorized deletes. Produce lib/my_app_web/live/posts_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.PostsLive): (1) add on_mount {MyAppWeb.UserAuth, :ensure_authenticated}, (2) per-event ownership check in handle_event("delete") that compares post.author_id to socket.assigns.current_user.id and denies mismatch with put_flash, (3) convert the post list from assign to stream, (4) use :if={post.author_id == @current_user.id} on the button instead of nested <%= if %>.
tier_rationale: Four coordinated fixes. The combination of auth + stream + :if must all land.
